one_line_summary: Well-documented CLI TDD flow with solid phase orchestration, but validation and integration depth are somewhat lightweight.
strengths: ADR is thorough, timely, and clearly defines the Driver/Navigator contract.
Feature is wired into the real CLI with coherent README, wiki, and help-text updates.
Tests cover ordering, RED/GREEN distinction, refactor handoff, and a happy-path end-to-end session.
weaknesses: No actual `/tdd` slash command exists; help text only documents a CLI-only path.
Refactor validation is mostly prompt/context-based rather than verifying a concrete applied change.
Implementation is somewhat standalone and only lightly integrates with broader Engine/PlanMode infrastructure.
